failures.description: The agent failed because it did not adhere to the required tool-call plan even though the correct arguments were already available. It substituted an incorrect argument set and skipped the required item_id, causing the rest of the run to fail.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user’s goal was to get the price of item 1345513440. The trajectory already contained the needed planned query at step 1: {"item_id": "1345513440", "product_id": "1762337868"}. At step 2, the agent instead prepared a different call, {"product_id": 0}, omitting the required item_id and replacing the known product_id with an unsupported value. This is the first failure in the run. The later schema error at step 3 is a consequence of that earlier deviation, and it was never corrected afterward.
